Amendments2021— renumbered as this section and substituted “Defense audit agencies: Small Business Ombudsmen” for “Small Business Ombudsman for defense audit agencies” in section catchline.Pub. L. 116–283section 204 of this title

Effective Date of 2021 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with additional provisions for delayed implementation and applicability of existing law, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 116–283section 1801(d) of Pub. L. 116–283section 3001 of this titleJan. 1, 2022

children.heading: .—Small Business Ombudsman
children.label: a .—Small Business Ombudsman
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall designate within each defense audit agency an official as the Small Business Ombudsman to have the duties described in subsection (b) and such other responsibilities as may be determined by the Secretary.
advise the Director of the defense audit agency on policy issues related to small business concerns;
serve as the defense audit agency’s primary point of contact and source of information for small business concerns;

children.label: A
children.text: data regarding the timeliness of audit closeouts for small business concerns; and

children.label: B
children.text: data regarding the responsiveness of the defense audit agency to issues or other matters raised by small business concerns; and

make recommendations to the Director regarding policies, processes, and procedures related to the timeliness of audits of small business concerns and the responsiveness of the defense audit agency to issues or other matters raised by small business concerns.

children.heading: .—Audit Independence
children.label: c .—Audit Independence
children.text: The Small Business Ombudsman of a defense audit agency shall be segregated from ongoing audits in the field and shall not engage in activities with regard to particular audits that could compromise the independence of the defense audit agency or undermine compliance with applicable audit standards.

children.heading: .—Defense Audit Agency Defined
children.label: d .—Defense Audit Agency Defined
children.text: In this section, the term “defense audit agency” means the Defense Contract Audit Agency and the Defense Contract Management Agency.
